summary: Exceptional execution: worker delivered all 13 house rules with full UI (collapsible setup, in-game modal), updated scoring engine to accept HouseRules param, integrated with Supabase multiplayer state, and deployed live with zero build errors. Verification was comprehensive (build + push + deploy all passing), cost was lean at $2.96 against unknown budget, and output is immediately actionable. Only minor deduction on output_quality: the SUMMARY.md lacks commit-by-commit detail and doesn't explicitly state which files were modified line-by-line, but the substance is complete and correct.
